title: Category:Toriyama Sekien
text: A Mikoshi-nyūdō , specifically a Miage-nyūdō , as portrayed by Toriyama Toriyama Sekien (鳥山 石燕, 1712 – September 22, 1788), is the pen-name of Sano Toyofusa, an 18th-century Japanese scholar, kyōka poet , and ukiyo-e artist. Links [ edit ] Category:Toriyama Sekien - Wikimedia Commons
